title: Class action alleges Nvidia hid more than $1b crypto-GPU income within its gaming revenues — investor lawsuit concerns business spanning 2017 and 2018
summary: Nvidia is back in court over whether a significant chunk of its revenue through 2017 and 2018 was reliant on the whims of the cryptocurrency market.

title: Gigabyte X870 Aorus Stealth Motherboard Review: The gothy Goldilocks of rear-connect AM5 motherboards
summary: Gigabyte’s X870 Aorus Stealth flies under the radar to give us one of the best reasonably priced BTF boards for the AM5 platform
